+    def delete_oldest_application_instance (self) :
+        """
+            Finds and deletes the oldest application instance
+            """
+        if not self.application_instances:
+            return
+    
+        # Find the scope_id with the smallest last_used timestamp
+        oldest_scope_id = min(
+            self.application_instances.keys(),
+            key=lambda scope_id: self.application_instances[scope_id]["last_used"]
         )
-        for scope_id, details in self.application_instances.items():

-                self.delete_application_instance(scope_id)
-                # Return to make sure we only delete one in case two have
-                # the same oldest time
-                return
-
+    
+        # Delete the oldest instance
+        self.delete_application_instance(oldest_scope_id)

+            Builds a scope and request body into a WSGI environ object.
+            """
+        environ = {}

+        # HTTP method

+        # Script name and path info (usually empty for root)
+        environ['SCRIPT_NAME'] = ''
+        environ['PATH_INFO'] = scope.get('path', '')
+    
+        # Query string
+        environ['QUERY_STRING'] = scope.get('query_string', b'').decode('latin-1')
+    
+        # Server and port information
+        environ['SERVER_NAME'] = scope.get('server', ['localhost', 80])[0]
+        environ['SERVER_PORT'] = str(scope.get('server', ['localhost', 80])[1])
+    
+        # HTTP version

+    
+        # WSGI specific variables

+        environ['wsgi.multiprocess'] = False
+        environ['wsgi.run_once'] = False

+        # Content type and length

+            if name == 'CONTENT_TYPE':
+                content_type = value
+            elif name == 'CONTENT_LENGTH':
+                content_length = value

+            # Add HTTP_ prefix for most headers

+                name = 'HTTP_' + name
+        
+            environ[name] = value
+    
+        # Set content type and length

+        environ['CONTENT_LENGTH'] = content_length

+        # Client address

+            environ['REMOTE_ADDR'] = scope['client'][0]
